_asana_pat_config_examples._comment: Configure ASANA_PAT using OpenCode variable substitution. Choose ONE option and rename 'asana_pat':

_instructions:
To use a configuration option, add this line (without underscore prefix) to the root of this JSON:
  "asana_pat": <your-chosen-option-value>
For security, prefer Option 1 (file-based). Option 3 (direct) is convenient but less secure.
